opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $52 couch cover erased 3 years of dog hair and stains in one afternoon
opportunities.before_state: Stained, pet-hair-covered, sagging couch cushions nobody wants to sit on
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, tailored slipcover with zero visible pet hair — looks brand new
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's viral pet-and-home pin plus Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission make this the highest-margin transformation play right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Sage green velvet blackout curtains (2-panel set)
opportunities.transformation_hook: $28 curtains turned this dorm room from cinderblock cell to boutique hotel
opportunities.before_state: Bare dorm window, cheap mini-blinds, harsh morning light, cinderblock walls
opportunities.after_state: Floor-length sage velvet curtains, blacked-out room, soft ambient glow
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is running a full dorm pin cluster weeks before August move-in, and sage velvet curtains are the most repeated item in it.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $35 headboard hack made this dorm bed look like a boutique hotel
opportunities.before_state: Bare twin XL mattress pushed against cinderblock wall, no back support
opportunities.after_state: Cushioned upholstered headboard with throw pillows, cozy reading-nook vibe
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's dorm-setup pin series (headboard, curtains, diffuser, mirror) is ramping ahead of August move-in, and the headboard is the anchor hero-shot item.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $24 in gold pulls made this whole kitchen look renovated
opportunities.before_state: Dated builder-grade oak cabinets with tarnished brass knobs
opportunities.after_state: Same cabinets, brushed gold pulls, instant modern boutique-kitchen look
opportunities.why_now: Gold/brass hardware is surfacing across HGTV midcentury pins and Apartment Therapy's DIY kitchen renovation stories as the cheapest lever for a visible kitchen reveal.

opportunities.specific_product: Wall-mounted entryway mirror with hooks and shelf
opportunities.transformation_hook: $68 entryway wall set turned our chaos corner into a boutique mudroom
opportunities.before_state: Shoes piled by the door, coats on chairs, no mirror, cluttered entry corner
opportunities.after_state: Mirror, hooks with coats hung, shelf with baskets, fully organized entry
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's dedicated entryway-staples pin signals fall organizing content is ramping as back-to-school routines return.
